# jbdevweb

> Freelance web developer in Auch (Gers), France. Shopify e-commerce, custom showcase websites, redesigns and local SEO for artisans, retailers and small businesses.

## Services

- [Home](https://jbdevweb.fr/): Overview — Shopify, showcase sites, local SEO
- [Shopify stores](https://jbdevweb.fr/shopify/): Shopify creation, Liquid themes, conversion and SEO
- [Showcase websites](https://jbdevweb.fr/sites-vitrines/): Custom fast websites, local SEO
- [Website creation in Auch](https://jbdevweb.fr/creation-site-internet-auch/): Local web design for Gers and Occitanie
- [Contact & quote](https://jbdevweb.fr/contact/): Free quote request

## Key guides (blog)

- [Cadence: Schedule & Launch](https://jbdevweb.fr/blog/cadence/): Shopify app for scheduled prices, sales and launches — $10/month, all plans
- [Stock Transfert Pro](https://jbdevweb.fr/blog/stock-transfert-pro-shopify/): Multi-location transfers, suppliers and purchase orders on Shopify App Store
- [Shopify pricing France 2026](https://jbdevweb.fr/blog/tarif-site-shopify-2026/): Plans Basic €33, Grow €88, Advanced €384/month, Shopify Payments fees
- [Shopify vs Wix vs Prestashop 2026](https://jbdevweb.fr/blog/comparatif-shopify-wix-prestashop-2026/)
- [Brick-and-mortar store online on Shopify](https://jbdevweb.fr/blog/magasin-physique-boutique-en-ligne/)
